recommendations.title: Dìdi (弟弟)
recommendations.overview: In 2008, during the last month of summer before high school begins, an impressionable 13-year-old Taiwanese American boy learns what his family can't teach him: how to skate, how to flirt, and how to love your mom.

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Arthur
recommendations.overview: A drunken playboy stands to lose a wealthy inheritance when he falls for a woman that his family doesn't like.

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.

recommendations.title: Love Actually
recommendations.overview: Eight very different couples deal with their love lives in various loosely interrelated tales all set during a frantic month before Christmas in London.

recommendations.title: Love in the Afternoon
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged playboy becomes fascinated by the daughter of a private detective who has been hired to entrap him with a client's wife.

recommendations.title: Mother of the Bride
recommendations.overview: Lana's daughter Emma returns from abroad and drops a bombshell: she's getting married. In Thailand. In a month! Things only get worse when Lana learns that the man who captured Emma's heart is the son of the man who broke hers years ago.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Match
recommendations.overview: Charlie is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he sticks to one woman for one month, he's bound to get attached. Charlie denies this yet accepts the seemingly easy challenge, until he cros

recommendations.title: What's New Pussycat?
recommendations.overview: A playboy who refuses to give up his hedonistic lifestyle to settle down and marry his true love seeks help from a demented psychoanalyst who is having romantic problems of his own.
